items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued investment in protecting Australian organisations and individuals online, and your organisation may see new compliance expectations or guidance in the coming months. Separately, while global phishing attack volumes have dropped by 20%, security experts warn the overall risk is still rising, as attacks are becoming more targeted and harder to detect.

**Practical tip:** Even if you receive fewer suspicious emails than before, stay cautious — today's phishing attempts are more convincing, so always verify unexpected requests before clicking links or sharing information.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches cybersecurity strategy phase two, directly shaping national security policy.
